name: Blueberry Oatmeal Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the bottom and sides of a 9-inch (9") layer cake pan.
2. Line the bottom with wax paper.
3. In a small bowl, combine blueberries and 2 tablespoons sugar. Spoon into the pan.
4. In a large bowl, mix corn syrup and remaining sugar. Add egg whites or egg replacer; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Combine dry ingredients (flour, cornstarch, baking soda, lemon rind) in another bowl. Stir into the egg mixture, alternating with mayonnaise.
6. Carefully spoon over the berries in the pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 - 45 minutes or until the top springs back when touched.
8. Remove from oven; let stand 5 minutes. Loosen sides with a metal spatula.
9. Invert onto a cooling rack and remove wax paper.
